title: Financial Market Basic Course
content:
## Financial Market Basic Course:

# First Step to Financial world

This is basic financial course which include all the basic understanding required for advance level course. The course includes the money and capital market concepts, Primary and secondary market concepts. Familiarization of Equity, commodity, currency market and their segments like Cash, Futures and Options. Various tools awareness to carry out Buy and Sell order executions. Know the Fundamental and Technical analysis parameters and difference in their philosophies, Understand various type of charts and their readings.

The program fee is ₹ 5000/- 
[Register Now](https://profitandstocks.com/enroll-now/%20) What we Offer 

## Financial Market Basic Course

###  Our Duration 

 The duration for training program is 2 week 

###  Training Schedule 

 Training sessions are conducted every week 

###  Payment Term 

 The fee is non-negotiable, but part payment may be allowed at the mentor's discretion. 

## Financial Market Basic CourseIncludes

- Introduction
- Financial Market
- Capital and Money Market.
- Commodity Market
- Currency Market
- Crypto Market
- Capital Market and its Instruments
- Money Market and its Instruments
- Primary and Secondary Market
- Face Value / Issue Price
- Equity Market and Exchange
- Indices and scripts
- Broker and Procedure
- BUY and SELL
- Order and Types
- Market, Limit, CO,BO,GTT Orders
- Brokerage and other charges
- Alerts / Tax / Software

- Limit Stop Orders
- Validity of Orders
- Profit and Stocks
- Trading and Types
- Technical / Fundamental Analysis
- Charts and Types
- Candlesticks
- Art of reading Candles
- Time Frames
- Indices / Stocks / Future/ Options
- Intraday / Swing / Positional / Scalping
- Bullish / Bearish
- Indicators Overview
- Bid / Offer / Volume
- Price and Value
- Dividends and Bonus
- Mutual Funds
- SIPs
The program fee is ₹ 5000/-[Register Now](https://profitandstocks.com/enroll-now/%20) For Whom 

- Beginners who want a guided approach to trading success.
- Traders / Investors.
- Students seeking First Step in Market
- Home Maker and House wife
- Eager to Learn Market Movement
- Experienced seeking Fresh Start
 Benefits 

- Understanding for Money and Capital MarketUnderstanding for Money and Capital Market
- Awareness for Primary and Secondary Market
- Material (Specially Designed for Professionals)
- First step understanding for Financial Market
- Technical Charts and its understanding
- Direction for advance course on Stock Market
 Why 

- Designed for New comers who want to grow his /her knowledge about financial Market
- Making Capital and Money Market understanding simple rather than complex to become Next Level trader/ Investor
- The marking on chart based on each Sessions will benefit to test the knowledge and skills
- You can obtain the knowledge and tools required to treat trading like a business.

###  WHO SHOULD ATTEND THE COURSE? 

- Beginners or Fresher in stock market
- Investors /Traders
- Financial advisor, Financial Analyst
- Eager to learn Market Movement
- Students (permission from Parents / Guardian required)

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Awareness for Primary and Secondary Market
- Awareness for Primary and Secondary Market
- Material (Specially Designed for Professionals)
- First step understanding for Financial Market
- Technical Charts and its understanding
-  Direction for advance course on Stock Market
- Order execution and Profit-loss Statement

###  PURPOSE OF COURSE 

- This course is Designed for New comers who want to grow his /her knowledge about financial Market
- This course content is making Capital and Money Market understanding simple rather than complex to become Next Level trader/ Investor
- The marking on chart based on each Sessions will benefit to test the knowledge and skills

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- The Trainers are SEBI / NISM Registered Research Analyst. 
- As time is precious. You are required to come on time in session
- You are required to maintain the positive decorum in session. Short dresses/unprofessional dresses are strictly not allowed
- Providing Training on Stock Market is being taken very seriously by “Profit and Stocks” Homework related to marking on charts will be given after each session to have understanding on the subject taken
- You need to have a meeting Online or Offline before registration
- As Training holds a big responsibility, Students need to meet with their Parents or Guardian. No registration for students without Parents / Guardian approval
- One needs to pay ₹ 2000 (part of training fees) after the meeting, to be part of the next available batch
- You are required to pay the fees within the first 2 sessions of course
- After joining, you are required to attend all sessions as each session is Next step from the previous session, if due to any unavoidable circumstances, you are not able to attend, you need to inform proactively
- Only one session, if missed, will be repeated to align trainees to the next level session
- If two or more sessions are missed, you will be considered in Next Batch available-no fees charges as already paid
- 2 months free consultation will be provided post training for review and development
- After the free consultation period, Consultation fees of 1100/- is applicable
- Pictures and Video making are not allowed during the training

title: Pro Trader Course- From Confusion to Clarity
content:
## Pro Trader Course:

# From Confusion to Clarity

The Pro Trader course is a advance training program. It is designed to provide traders with all of the knowledge and tools they will need to become a successful professional trader. From market structure and market harmonics to advanced pattern recognition, Fibonacci analysis, trader psychology, strategy development, back-testing, money management, trade plan development, and understand practical approach towards market movement (direction and speed). Psychological Approach understanding and provide direction for focusing on right approach.

The program fee is ₹ 35000/-
[Register Now](https://profitandstocks.com/enroll-now/%20) What we Offer 

## Pro Trader Course- From Confusion to Clarity

###  Our Duration 

 The duration for training program is 7 week 

###  Training Schedule 

 Training sessions are conducted every week 

###  Payment Term 

 The fee is non-negotiable, but part payment may be allowed at the mentor's discretion. 

## Pro Trader Course- From Confusion to Clarity CourseIncludes

## Introduction-Pro Trader Course

- Becoming a Professional Trader
- Practical Approach to Market
- Market Analysis
- Making understanding Simple

## 1st Step- What is Technical Analysis?

- Overview of Technical Analysis
- Technical vs Fundamental Analysis
- NISM Certification Overview
- Factors in technical analysis
- Advantages
- Long-term vs. Medium Term vs. short-term

## Types and Interpreting Charts

- Tools- The construction of 4 types of Charts
- Bar chart
- Line chart
- Candlesticks chart
- Candle volume chart
- Various Time related
- Emotional Candlesticks
- Why I hate candlesticks- Fail/ Pass
- Why I Hate Patterns -Fail/ Pass

## Trend analysis

- Trends circle
- Real and Fake Trend
- Checking of Trend on Chart
- Marking of Trend on Chart
- Major and minor Trend
- Long-term vs. Medium Term vs. short-term

## Trend Change Analysis

- What is Trend change
- Checking of Trend change on Chart
- Marking of Trend change on Chart
- Real and Fake Trend Change
- Support and Resistance Lines
- In Phase and Out of Phase Trend change

## Market Structure Analysis

- What is Structure
- Major Structure
- Minor Structure
- Green-Structural Support and Resistance
- Red-Structural Support and Resistance
- Green-Un-Structural Support and Resistance
- Red-Un-Structural Support and Resistance

## Structure and Ratio Analysis

- Structure Ratio
- Practical Approach to Structure Ratio
- Multi Time Frame Ratio
- Structure Ratio and Zone
- Specialist Edge and Green Zone
- Specialist Edge and Red Zone

## Structure and Indicators

- Structure or Indicators
- Indicators -Just a formula
- Indicators Failures
- Structure/ Indicators on charts- Understanding
- Structure/ Indicators on charts-Marking

## Understanding Direction and Speed

- Trend, Structure vs Direction
- Identifying Trend checklist
- Identifying Structure checklist
- Decoding The Green Direction
- Checking Green Direction on Chart
- Decoding The Red Direction
- Checking Red Direction on Chart
- Decoding the Green Speed
- Checking Green Speed on Chart
- Decoding the Red Speed
- Checking Red Speed on Chart

## Professional Trading -Eagle eye view
Pullback -Understanding and Trading style

- Pullback Green Trading
- PGT-Checking on Chart
- Pullback Red Trading PRT-Checking on Chart
- Intraday, Swing and Positional Perspective
Breakout -Understanding and Trading style

- Breakout Green Trading
- BGT-Checking on Chart
- Breakout Red Trading
- BRT-Checking on Chart
- Intraday, Swing and Positional Perspective
Sideway -Understanding and Trading style

- Sideway Green Trading
- SGT-Checking on Chart
- Sideway Red Trading
- SRT-Checking on Chart
- Intraday, Swing and Positional Perspective
Vertical Move -Understanding and Trading style

- Vertical Move Green Trading
- VGT-Checking on Chart
- Vertical Move Red Trading
- VRT-Checking on Chart
- Intraday, Swing and Positional Perspective

## Professional Trading -Eagle eye view
Stop loss -Understanding and Trading style

- Stop loss for Green Trading
- SLGT-Checking on Chart
- Stop loss for Red Trading
- SLRT-Checking on Chart
- Intraday, Swing and Positional Perspective
Conflicting Time Frame -Understanding and Trading style

- Conflicting TF for Green Trading
- CTFGT-Checking on Chart
- Conflicting TF for Red Trading
- CTFRT-Checking on Chart
- Intraday, Swing and Positional Perspective
Shadow on Candle -Understanding

- Shadow for Green Direction
- SGD-Checking on Chart
- Shadow for Red Direction
- SRD-Checking on Chart
- Intraday, Swing and Positional Perspective
Gap Up and Gap Down -Understanding

- Gap Up for Green Direction
- Gap Up for Red Direction
- Gap Down for Green Direction
- Gap Down for Red Direction
- Wide/Moderate Gap Up and Down
- Intraday, Swing and Positional Perspective

## Trade Plan and Journal

- Identify Your Strength and Weakness- Technical/Non Technical
- Budget and Money Constraint
- Stock Selection and Markings
- Trade Plan and Development based on Scenario
- Position Sizing
- Risk Reward Ratio set up and calculation
- Way out for avoiding Non Technical mistakes
- Less is more in Trading-Understand the concept with Mind Change

title: Pro Trader course- Option specific
content:
## Pro Trader Course:

# Option Specific
 This is options specific course which include all the advance understanding required for options trading, be it Option Buying or Options selling. The course includes the understanding of Options behavior with respect to underlying security movement and with respect to time to expiry. This course is in continuation to Pro trader course which emphasis to understand market direction and speed. Understand the concept and logic behind various Options (ITM, ATM, OTM) chart and its selection for trade with proper risk-reward ratio. The program fee is ₹ 9000/- [Register Now](https://profitandstocks.com/enroll-now/%20) What we Offer

title: NISM Certification Program
content:
## NISM Certification Program:

# Goal with Boundary
 We are NISM/SEBI Registered Research Analyst and Provide Training and Guidance for NISM/SEBI Certification Program. These are pre-requisite to any product business related to Financial Market. 
 For these certifications, one need to appear in exam conducted by NISM/SEBI. 

The program fee is ₹ 6000-11000/- per course
[Register Now](https://profitandstocks.com/enroll-now/%20) What we Offer 

## Key Details of Our NISM Certification Program

###  Our Duration 

 Based on Certification (4-8weeks) 

###  Training Schedule 

 Weekend classes 

###  Payment Term 

 INR 6000 - 11000 per course 
 For Whom 

- Newcomer in Market and want to seek certification
- Person who is looking for job where certificate is pre-requisite
- Person providing specific service and need certificate as a mandatory requirement
 Benefits 

- Start with right approach and result oriented direction
- Get do’s and don’ts along with checklist for systematic approach
- Practice sessions with previous exams
 Why 

- NISM/SEBI Certificate Trainers
- Practical approach with examples
- Statutory requirements
- Practical training beyond theoretical bookish concepts

###  WHO SHOULD ATTEND THE COURSE? 

- Beginners or Fresher in stock market
- Investors /Traders
- Financial advisor, Financial Analyst
- Eager to get Certification
- Students (permission from Parents / Guardian required)

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Start with right approach and result oriented direction
- Get do’s and don’ts along with checklist for systematic approach
- Practice sessions with previous exams
- Manage the Job/Business along with Trade/Investment 
- Psychological Approach is important for any Trader/Investor
-  Timing is crucial in market and understanding the balanced approach is must
- Practical approach based preparation.

###  PURPOSE OF COURSE 

- NISM/SEBI Certificate Trainers
- Practical approach with examples
- Statutory requirements

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- The Trainers are SEBI / NISM Registered Research Analyst. 
- As time is precious. You are required to come on time in session
- You are required to maintain the positive decorum in session. Short dresses/unprofessional dresses are strictly not allowed
- Providing Training on Stock Market is being taken very seriously by “Profit and Stocks” Homework related to marking on charts will be given after each session to have understanding on the subject taken
- You need to have a meeting Online or Offline before registration
- As Training hold big responsibility, Students need to meet with their Parents or Guardian. No registration for students without Parents / Guardian approval.
- One needs to pay ₹ 2000 (part of training fees) after the meeting, to be part of the next available batch
- You are required to pay the fees within the first 2 sessions of course
- After joining, you are required to attend all sessions as each session is Next step from the previous session, if due to any unavoidable circumstances, you are not able to attend, you need to inform proactively
- Only one session, if missed, will be repeated to align trainees to the next level session
- If two or more sessions are missed, you will be considered in Next Batch available-no fees charges as already paid
- 2 months free consultation will be provided post training for review and development
- After the free consultation period, Consultation fees of 1100/- is applicable
- Pictures and Video making are not allowed during the training
- One needs to bring a Blank register and Green/Red/Blue pen and laptop for making notes
- You are abided by a confidentiality clause that no training material or pictures will be shared with any other person

title: Advisory Services
content:
## Advisory Services:

# Shoot the Arrow
 We are NISM/SEBI Registered Research Analyst and Provide Services for recommendation for Equity, commodity. We will be intimating this through Advisory Group and based on call, you need to initiate the trade. This is strictly for members. 

 Daily/ Weekly Buy and Sell or Short and Close intimation Per month fee is ₹ 2000/-[Register Now](https://profitandstocks.com/enroll-now/%20) What we Offer 

## Key Details of Advisory Services

###  Our Duration 

 Based on alters Daily/Weekly 

###  Training Schedule 

 Alerts based 

###  Payment Term 

 Non-Negotiable 2000/month 
 With one time charge of 5000/- 
 For Whom 

- New comer in Market and want Second income
- Job/ Business related person who are not having time for Trade/ Invest
- Persons who want to invest in Market but they don’t want to do their own
 Benefits 

- Systematic Alerts for BUY and Sell
- Time saving for study and waiting for entry
- Getting logical entry and exit on top 200 stocks
 Why 

- This is system based so no human interface for Entry and Exit Alerts
- One can’t scan top 200 stock, it will filter out
- No need to study again and again for set of parameters

###  WHO SHOULD ATTEND THE SERVICE? 

- Beginners or Fresher in stock market
- Investors /Traders
- Financial advisor, Financial Analyst
- Eager to earn from Market Movement
- Students (permission from Parents / Guardian required)

###  WHAT YOU GET? 

- Trade call (Specific to your needs) based on Technical Analysis.
- Material (Specially Designed for Professionals).
- Investment mentorship Support for Investment Purpose (Two Months only).
- Real Trading in Live market timing with records.
- Path for independent Professional Trader
-  Psychological Impact for help in trade.
- Practical approach based Trading/ Investing. calls

###  PURPOSE OF SERVICE 

- This service is Designed for trader who want to grow his /her investment Trading & investment.
- This service is based on Advisory from NISM/SEBI Certified RA. 
- This is purely for closed group.
- Separate Group for Intraday and Positional Services
- Entry, Stop Loss and Exit call are provided

## REGISTRATION & NOTES

- The Trainers and Advisor are SEBI / NISM Registered Research Analyst. 
- You need to have meeting Online or Offline before registration.
- One need to pay Registration fees meeting to be part of next available batch.
- You need to execute the trade based on Call
- Technical Glitch in Broker platform is beyond our control.
- The account shall be individual name. 
- You are abided by a confidentiality clause that no Trading calls shared with any other person
